basic_details.job_title: BFUHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 630 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS), Faridkot
basic_details.short_information: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS), Faridkot has released a recruitment notification for Medical Officer posts in 2026. The university invites online applications from eligible candidates for 630 Medical Officer vacancies under the Department of Health and Family Welfare, Punjab.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 16-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 05-08-2026

age_limit.details: Minimum Age Limit: 18 Years Maximum Age Limit: 37 Years Age relaxation for reserved categories will be provided as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree / As per BFUHS Recruitment Rules

how_to_apply: Download and read the official notification carefully.
Click on the online application link.
Register using your email ID and mobile number.
Fill out the application form with correct details.
Upload required documents, photograph and signature.
Pay the application fee, if applicable.
Submit the application form and take a printout for future reference.

rows.baba_farid_university_of_health_sciences: MBBS Degree / As per BFUHS Recruitment Rules

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Starting Date for Apply Online: 16-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 05-08-2026

content_sections.heading: BFUHS Medical Officer Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences has invited applications for the Medical Officer post. The detailed vacancy distribution will be available in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for BFUHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates having the required medical qualification can apply for the Medical Officer post. The eligibility details are as follows: Medical Officer: Candidates should possess an MBBS Degree from a recognized institution and fulfil other eligibility conditions mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: BFUHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age Limit: 18 Years Maximum Age Limit: 37 Years Age relaxation for reserved categories will be provided as per government norms.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for BFUHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official BFUHS website. Open the recruitment section. Download and read the official notification carefully. Click on the online application link. Register using your email ID and mobile number. Fill out the application form with correct details. Upload required documents, photograph and signature. Pay the application fee, if applicable. Submit the application form and take a printout for future reference.

faq.answer: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS) has released the recruitment advertisement for Medical Officer posts in 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name under BFUHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name is Medical Officer.

Q4. What is the application start date for BFUHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process will start on 16-07-2026.

faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form is 05-08-2026.
